trades.assessment: Dip and Rip following a halt
trades.notes: This is a failed dip and rip on a halt. Very rarely does this work. Gamble.!

notes.title: AI Prompt
notes.content:
"I have a new CSV file with my trading results that I'd like you to analyze. Please create a detailed trading performance analysis that includes:

1. Comprehensive dashboard with visualizations showing:

  • Key performance metrics (P&L, win rate, profit factor, etc.)

  • Performance by symbol with charts

  • Daily performance breakdown

  • Win/loss distribution

  • Capital deployment vs P&L scatter plot

  • Complete trade history table

2. Advanced pattern analysis covering:

  • Hold time analysis (average, shortest, longest)

  • Performance by hold time brackets

  • Time-of-day trading patterns

  • Return on capital analysis

  • Risk analysis (largest gains/losses as % of capital)

  • Consecutive loss streaks

  • Position size correlation with performance

3. Strategic insights and recommendations including:

  • Performance summary with strengths and weaknesses

  • Specific areas for improvement

  • Risk management suggestions

  • Timing optimization recommendations

  • Position sizing guidelines

  • Pattern recognition insights

Please use the analysis tool first to examine the data structure, then create an interactive dashboard artifact with all visualizations and metrics. Follow up with detailed written analysis of patterns and actionable recommendations for improving my trading strategy."
